nasb.text: For the bread of God is that which comes down out of heaven, and gives life to the world.”

esv.text: For the bread of God is he who comes down from heaven and gives life to the world.”

cnv.text: 因為　神的食物就是從天上降下來，把生命賜給世人的那一位。”

ccb.text: 因为上帝赐的粮就是从天降下、赐生命给世人的那位。”

csbs.text: 要知道，神的粮就是从天上降下来、赐生命给世人的那一位。”
